title: calochortus panamintensis
intro: Calochortus panamintensis is a rare, perennial plant species that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is also known as Panamint mariposa lily or desert mariposa lily. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and provide relief from colds and flu.
